languages.text: {n}Гнев загорается в темных глазах Ардженты.{/n} "Ты даже не представляешь, как легко такая "предприимчивость" утягивает в объятья мрака! Берегись... Вольный Торговец. Начав с одобрения ереси твоей предшественницы, ты можешь повторить ее судьбу".

traits.locale_text: {n}Гнев загорается в темных глазах Ардженты.{/n} "Ты даже не представляешь, как легко такая "предприимчивость" утягивает в объятья мрака! Берегись... Вольный Торговец. Начав с одобрения ереси твоей предшественницы, ты можешь повторить ее судьбу".
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: {n}Argenta's dark eyes alight with wrath.{/n} "You have no idea how often such 'enterprise' drags people into darkness! Beware... Rogue Trader. Approving of your predecessor's heresy means you risk sharing her fate."
languages.original_text: {n}Гнев загорается в темных глазах Ардженты.{/n} "Ты даже не представляешь, как легко такая "предприимчивость" утягивает в объятья мрака! Берегись... Вольный Торговец. Начав с одобрения ереси твоей предшественницы, ты можешь повторить ее судьбу".

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta's dark eyes light up with wrath.{/n} "You have no idea how often such "enterprise" drags people into darkness! Beware... Rogue Trader. By starting with approval of your predecessor's heresy you risk repeating her fate."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta's dark eyes light up with wrath.{/n} "You have no idea how often such "enterprise" drags people into darkness! Beware... Rogue Trader. By starting with approval of your predecessor's heresy you risk repeating her fate."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta's dark eyes alight with wrath.{/n} "You have no idea how often such 'enterprise' drags people into darkness! Beware... Rogue Trader. Approving of your predecessor's heresy means you risk sharing her fate."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta's dark eyes alight with wrath.{/n} "You have no idea how often such 'enterprise' drags people into darkness! Beware... Rogue Trader. Approving of your predecessor's heresy means you risk sharing her fate."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta's dark eyes alight with wrath.{/n} "You have no idea how often such 'enterprise' drags people into darkness! Beware... Rogue Trader. Approving of your predecessor's heresy means you risk sharing her fate."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: {n}Argentas dunkle Augen leuchten vor Zorn.{/n} "Ihr habt keine Ahnung, wie oft solche 'Unternehmungen' die Menschen in die Dunkelheit ziehen! Hüte dich... Schurkenhändlerin. Wenn Ihr die Ketzerei Eurer Vorgängerin gutheißt, riskiert Ihr, ihr Schicksal zu teilen."
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta's dark eyes alight with wrath.{/n} "You have no idea how often such 'enterprise' drags people into darkness! Beware... Rogue Trader. Approving of your predecessor's heresy means you risk sharing her fate."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argentas dunkle Augen leuchten vor Zorn.{/n} "Ihr habt keine Ahnung, wie oft solche 'Unternehmungen' die Menschen in die Dunkelheit ziehen! Hüte dich... Schurkenhändlerin. Wenn Ihr die Ketzerei Eurer Vorgängerin gutheißt, riskiert Ihr, ihr Schicksal zu teilen."

languages.text: {n}Les yeux sombres d'Argenta s'illuminent de colère.{/n} "Tu n'as pas idée du nombre de fois où ce genre d'entreprise entraîne les gens dans les ténèbres ! Méfiez-vous... Rogue Trader. Approuver l'hérésie de votre prédécesseur signifie que vous risquez de partager son destin."
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta's dark eyes alight with wrath.{/n} "You have no idea how often such 'enterprise' drags people into darkness! Beware... Rogue Trader. Approving of your predecessor's heresy means you risk sharing her fate."

traits.locale_text: {n}Les yeux sombres d'Argenta s'illuminent de colère.{/n} "Tu n'as pas idée du nombre de fois où ce genre d'entreprise entraîne les gens dans les ténèbres ! Méfiez-vous... Rogue Trader. Approuver l'hérésie de votre prédécesseur signifie que vous risquez de partager son destin."

languages.text: {n}Los ojos oscuros de Argenta se encienden de ira.{/n} "¡No tienes ni idea de la frecuencia con que semejante 'empresa' arrastra a la gente a las tinieblas! Cuidado... Rogue Trader. Aprobar la herejía de tu predecesora significa que te arriesgas a compartir su destino".
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta's dark eyes alight with wrath.{/n} "You have no idea how often such 'enterprise' drags people into darkness! Beware... Rogue Trader. Approving of your predecessor's heresy means you risk sharing her fate."

traits.locale_text: {n}Los ojos oscuros de Argenta se encienden de ira.{/n} "¡No tienes ni idea de la frecuencia con que semejante 'empresa' arrastra a la gente a las tinieblas! Cuidado... Rogue Trader. Aprobar la herejía de tu predecesora significa que te arriesgas a compartir su destino".

languages.text: {n}Argenta'nın kara gözleri öfkeyle parlıyor.{/n} "Bu tür 'girişimlerin' insanları ne kadar sık karanlığa sürüklediği hakkında hiçbir fikriniz yok! Dikkatli olun. Haydut Tüccar. Selefinin sapkınlığını onaylamak, onun kaderini paylaşma riskini aldığın anlamına gelir."
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta's dark eyes alight with wrath.{/n} "You have no idea how often such 'enterprise' drags people into darkness! Beware... Rogue Trader. Approving of your predecessor's heresy means you risk sharing her fate."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta'nın kara gözleri öfkeyle parlıyor.{/n} "Bu tür 'girişimlerin' insanları ne kadar sık karanlığa sürüklediği hakkında hiçbir fikriniz yok! Dikkatli olun. Haydut Tüccar. Selefinin sapkınlığını onaylamak, onun kaderini paylaşma riskini aldığın anlamına gelir."
